privileged_info_summary: The task is a retail merchandising planogram task where an agent must create a shelf layout diagram in draw.io. All file paths are verified: strategy file at /home/ga/Desktop/merchandising_strategy.txt (created with 8 cereal products in 4 shelf categories), output diagram at /home/ga/Desktop/cereal_planogram.drawio, and PNG export at /home/ga/Desktop/cereal_planogram.png. Product categorization is verified: Top shelf (All Bran, Muesli), Eye level (Corn Flakes, Raisin Bran), Touch level (Froot Loops, Apple Jacks), Bottom shelf (Bag O' Puffs, Value Oats). All data is synthetic, created by the setup script.
